creator: _jkrow
caption:
This is the hidden gem ski destination no one’s talking about ⛷️ #ad

If you love off the beaten path adventures (and also kind of over the crowded, mainstream ski scene) add Charlevoix in Quebec to your list

It’s just a few hours from the northeast USA with cozy hotels, river views, incredible food and two ski spots that are still total hidden gems

There’s no viral ski village here and no chaos. Just mountains with beautiful views overlooking the St. Lawrence River…and space to actually enjoy them

The best ski spots are:

❄️ Le Massif de Charlevoix - with runs that drop straight toward the St. Lawrence River and the highest vertical drop east of the Canadian Rockies

❄️ Mont Grand-Fonds - nearby, smaller, scenic, under the radar

#bonjourquebec #tourismequebec #charlevoix #lemassifdecharlevoix #montgrandfonds

transcription.text: I gotta be honest, I didn't come to Charlevoix to ski, but now that winter's coming, it's all I can think about. On our last trip here, we stayed in the coolest hotels, ate amazing food, explored the trails, and scaled the cliffs. And even without the skis, this place really stuck with me. Then I saw what skiing here actually looks like. Le Massif drops straight toward the St. Lawrence River. It looks like one of those places that makes you want to stop mid-run just to take it all in. And it has the highest vertical drop east of the Canadian Rockies, which is pretty spectacular. Then there's Mont Cranfon. It's a resort nearby that's a lot smaller and more local if you like something with a more laid-back vibe. I can't wait to visit Charlevoix again, but next time, I'm definitely bringing my skis.
